name: event-driven
description: Message-driven architecture discipline: broker/transport choice, topic and partition design, event schema versioning, delivery semantics (assume at-least-once), consumer idempotency, the outbox pattern for atomic state-change-and-publish, sagas with compensation, and dead-letter handling — a firing event-driven skill and a /event-driven:review command. Cross-broker; defers in-process framework queues to the stack plugin.
